items.title: Web Development & CMS
items.description: Custom WordPress, WooCommerce, Vue, and Laravel development with responsive design, SEO optimization, and payment system integration.

items.title: Hybrid Mobile App (PWA, Web, Android)
items.description: Cross-platform mobile solutions combining PWA and Capacitor — installable web apps and hybrid Android APKs from a single Vue/React codebase.
highlights: Offline Mode, Push Notifications & Service Workers

items.title: Custom Software & Tools Development
items.description: Bespoke desktop applications, internal business tools, utility software, and process automation scripts tailored to your workflow.

items.title: IT Support & System Administration
items.description: End-to-end IT support for businesses — PC assembly, OS installation, hardware/software diagnostics, remote support, and user training.

items.title: ERP & Business Systems Administration
items.description: Full-cycle ERP management including module configuration, data entry, payroll, inventory, POS, and user support across various business systems.

items.title: Network Infrastructure & Security
items.description: Basic network services — IP configuration, LAN/router setup, printer sharing, firewall, and general network troubleshooting for small offices and production floors.

items.title: E-Commerce & Online Store Solutions
items.description: Full WooCommerce store development on WordPress — from theme customization and product catalog setup to photography, infographics, order management, and promotional email campaigns.

items.title: Email Marketing & Campaigns
items.description: End-to-end email campaign management — from strategy and copywriting to automation, analytics, and subscriber list management.

items.title: Email & Web Template Design
items.description: Custom-coded HTML email templates and responsive web page templates designed for branding, engagement, and cross-client compatibility.

items.title: Graphic Design & Branding
items.description: Professional print and digital design — business identity, promotional materials, product visuals, and social media creatives.

items.title: Video Editing
items.description: Creative video editing and post-production for social media reels, promotional clips, event recaps, and multimedia presentations.

items.title: AI-Powered Multimedia Production
items.description: End-to-end multimedia content created with AI — comics, cartoons, digital art, image manipulation, audio editing, music scoring, and motion graphics for media and marketing.

items.title: AI Writing & Document Help
items.description: Practical AI-powered writing for everyday needs — resumes, cover letters, official emails, applications, reports, and business documents done fast.

items.title: AI Image & Photo Services
items.description: Real-world image solutions — product photos, portrait retouching, background removal, old photo restoration, and custom visuals for personal or business use.

items.title: AI Automation & Chatbot Setup
items.description: Practical automation for small businesses — AI chatbots for customer queries, automated email replies, data entry help, and simple workflow bots.

groups.title: Creative Services — Powered by A.I.
groups.note: AI-assisted creative works — content, design, print, and branding deliverables.

items.title: Custom Poetry & Voice
items.description: Personalized poetry and spoken-word content for events, presentations, and media projects — crafted with AI assistance and delivered in text or voice format.

items.title: Custom Songs & Music Production
items.description: Original songs with personalized lyrics, AI-assisted music composition, and video production — suitable for wedding presentations, brand campaigns, and special celebrations.

items.title: AI Video Content Creation
items.description: Video content from concept to final edit — AI-powered visuals, animation, and storyboarding combined with professional editing for social media, portfolios, and promotions.

items.title: Pencil Sketch & Portrait Art
items.description: Hand-drawn pencil portraits from reference photos — realistic sketch art on paper with optional framing, capturing expressions with traditional technique and AI-enhanced reference processing.

items.title: AI Home Decor Design
items.description: Custom wall art and decor designs created with AI — framed pictures, canvas prints, and thematic pieces tailored to your space, style, and preferred dimensions.

items.title: Custom Stationery & Branding
items.description: Bespoke stationery sets, t-shirt graphics, brand identity guides, and merchandise design — combining graphics software expertise with AI for a polished, professional finish.

groups.title: Industrial & On-Site
groups.note: Specialized services for manufacturing environments — available for on-site work.

items.title: Desktop Automation & Hardware Integration
items.description: Custom C# .NET desktop applications integrated with industrial hardware — weight scales, barcode printers, serial ports, and ERP systems for production environments.

items.title: Industrial RFID, Barcode & IoT Systems
items.description: Production floor data collection infrastructure — RFID terminals, MOXA serial communication over RJ-6 (RS-485), barcode automation, and IoT checkpoint systems.
highlights: RFID NXP MCU Terminal Setup & Management
Production Floor RFID Checkpoints & Data Collection

items.title: Production Floor IT & Systems Support
items.description: IT support tailored for manufacturing environments — workstation setup, printer/network troubleshooting, ERP user admin, and equipment integration across production lines.
highlights: PC / Printer Setup & Troubleshooting on Production Floor
File & Printer Sharing for Workshop Environments
